document_api_meta.title: Get Opportunity Detail
document_api_meta.env_desc: Retrieve the full details of a single opportunity lead by its ID, including market trend data, competition level, and recommended actions.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: locale
request_query_param.desc: Expressed using {language_code}-{COUNTRY_CODE}, in accordance with the BCP-47 standard.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: request_id
response_param.desc: Request log

response_param.name: data
response_param.desc: Specific return information

response_param.name: ^opportunity
response_param.desc: The information of the opportunity

response_param.name: ^^id
response_param.desc: Unique ID of the opportunity

response_param.name: ^^action_type
response_param.desc: Recommended action type: LIST_SAME（发同款）/ LIST_SIMILAR（发相似品）

response_param.name: ^^listing_criteria
response_param.desc: The criteria for products that match the opportunity lead.

response_param.name: ^^^product_brand
response_param.desc: Requirement for product brand.

response_param.name: ^^^product_category
response_param.example: Phones & Electronics > Gaming & Consoles > Console Accessories
response_param.desc: Requirement for product category.

response_param.name: ^^^product_status
response_param.desc: Requirement for product status : LIVE / DRAFT

response_param.name: ^^^keywords
response_param.desc: Keywords listed are required to be included in title/attributes/description,etc.

response_param.name: ^^content_data
response_param.desc: The relevant data for the past 30 days.

response_param.name: ^^^video_view_pv
response_param.desc: The cumulative short video view count of all videos associated with this product opportunity.

response_param.name: ^^^shoppable_video_search_pv
response_param.desc: Search PV count of all short videos with shopping intent associated with product opportunity.

response_param.name: ^^^trending_hashtag
response_param.desc: The top 1 video hashtag of the product-related videos, sorted by view count.

response_param.name: ^^^top_shoppable_video_links
response_param.desc: Links to the top 10 shoppable short videos related to the product, sorted by view count.

response_param.name: ^^market_data
response_param.desc: The relevant data for the past 30 days.

response_param.name: ^^^est_market_sales_volume
response_param.desc: Estimated overall market sales volume.

response_param.name: ^^^est_market_gmv
response_param.desc: Estimated overall market sales GMV in USD.

response_param.name: ^^^market_buzz
response_param.desc: Popularity level of the product: HOT / HIGH / MEDIUM

response_param.name: ^^^search_volume
response_param.desc: TikTok Shop in-site user search volume.

response_param.name: ^^^search_keyword
response_param.desc: TikTok Shop in-site user search keyword.

response_param.name: ^^^competitor_product_count
response_param.desc: Number of competing products currently listed.

response_param.name: ^^^competitor_seller_count
response_param.desc: Number of competing sellers with the products currently listed.

response_param.name: ^^basic_info
response_param.desc: The detailed information of the opportunity.

response_param.name: ^^^opportunity_type
response_param.desc: Type of opportunity: PRODUCT（品线索）/ KEYWORD（词线索）/ CATEGORY（类目线索）

response_param.name: ^^^status
response_param.desc: Opportunity status: ACTIVE / EXPIRED / FULFILLED(已提报)

response_param.name: ^^^create_time
response_param.desc: Opportunity creation timestamp, second-level timestamp

response_param.name: ^^^expire_time
response_param.desc: Opportunity expiry date, second-level timestamp

response_param.name: ^^^title
response_param.desc: Opportunity title.

response_param.name: ^^^category_id_level_1
response_param.desc: TikTok Shop L1 category ID.

response_param.name: ^^^category_id_level_2
response_param.desc: TikTok Shop L2 category ID.

response_param.name: ^^^category_id_level_3
response_param.desc: TikTok Shop L3 category ID.

response_param.name: ^^^category_name_level_1
response_param.desc: Category name of 1st level category.

response_param.name: ^^^category_name_level_2
response_param.desc: Category name of 2nd level category.

response_param.name: ^^^category_name_level_3
response_param.desc: Category name of 3rd level category.

response_param.name: ^^^reference_price
response_param.desc: Reference price of the product to list.

response_param.name: ^^^reference_images
response_param.desc: Reference product images of the product to list.

response_param.name: ^^^brand_info
response_param.desc: Brand requirements for products specified by the opportunity.

response_param.name: ^^^reward_info
response_param.desc: Rewards that sellers can gain by listing products as required.

response_param.name: ^^^recom_info
response_param.desc: Recommendation reason why this is an opportunity.

document_api_meta.response_body: {"code":0,"data":{"opportunity":{"id":"7123456789012345678","action_type":"LIST_SAME","listing_criteria":{"product_brand":"brand1","product_category":"Phones \u0026 Electronics \u003e Gaming \u0026 Consoles \u003e Console Accessories","product_status":"LIVE","keywords":"word1,word2"},"content_data":{"video_view_pv":"7k+","shoppable_video_search_pv":"336k+","trending_hashtag":"tag1,tag2","top_shoppable_video_links":["https://www.tiktok.com/@/video/v15044gf0000d4l7p57og65m3s0tqfa0","https://www.tiktok.com/@/video/v15044gf0000d306lrnog65h1a6283ug"]},"market_data":{"est_market_sales_volume":"100k+","est_market_gmv":"$9M+","market_buzz":"HOT","search_volume":"100k+","search_keyword":"holiday","competitor_product_count":"100k+","competitor_seller_count":"35"},"basic_info":{"opportunity_type":"PRODUCT","status":"ACTIVE","create_time":1775973876,"expire_time":1775973876,"title":"title","category_id_level_1":"901128","category_id_level_2":"30122212","category_id_level_3":"40122212","category_name_level_1":"Shoes","category_name_level_2":"Women's Shoes","category_name_level_3":"Sandals \u0026 Flip Flops","reference_price":"$36.3 - $38.5","reference_images":["https://p16-oec-va.ibyteimg.com/tos-maliva-i-o3syd03w52-us/61e605ce483f4f7b9b419d510f74fd22~tplv-o3syd03w52-resize-image:400:400.image?dr=15586\u0026t=555f072d\u0026ps=933b5bde\u0026shp=5563f2fb\u0026shcp=122e87b3\u0026idc=maliva\u0026from=1432613627\u0026from_p=305039283"],"brand_info":"some brand info","reward_info":"Boost shoptab visibility","recom_info":"Trending, but out of stock"}}},"message":"Success","request_id":"202203070749000101890810281E8C70B7"}

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: The Partner will be able to sync your product information to TikTok Shop(s). For products available in the EU markets, this also includes the information of the Responsible Persons and Manufacturer.
scope_list.auth_info: The Partner will be able to sync your product information to TikTok Shop(s). For products available in the EU markets, this also includes the information of the Responsible Persons and Manufacturer.

request_path_param.name: opportunity_id
request_path_param.desc: The unique ID of the opportunity lead generated by TikTok Shop.
